Courses & Programs: PROJECT: SRIMCA AI Assistant (Flutter Mobile App + Flask Backend)
PURPOSE: A college management system with AI-powered assistant for
SRIMCA (Shrimad Rajchandra Institute of Management & Computer Applications)
The AI assistant uses data scraped/preprocessed from SRIMCA's official website
Manual extraction from SRIMCA official website
or integrated into the main application flow:
SRIMCA full name is Shrimad Rajchandra Institute of Management and Computer Application.
SRIMCA is located at Maliba Campus, Gopal Vidyanagar, Bardoli, Surat, Gujarat.
SRIMCA is a constituent college of Uka Tarsadia University.
SRIMCA offers MCA and MBA programmes approved by AICTE.
SRIMCA has more than 250 computers with Wi-Fi connectivity.
SRIMCA provides 200 MBps dedicated internet leased line.
SRIMCA library contains national and international books and journals.
SRIMCA has an auditorium, seminar hall and modern classrooms.
Infrastructure & Facilities: College full name: "Shrimad Rajchandra Institute of Management and Computer Application"
* Infrastructure details (computers, Wi-Fi, internet, library, auditorium)
Academic Calendar: * Programs: MCA (started 2002), MBA (started 2004) approved by AICTE
MCA programme started in the year 2002.
MBA programme started in the year 2004.
Class Timetable: MCA 2nd Semester commenced from Thursday, 30 January 2025.
MCA 4th Semester commenced from Monday, 16 December 2024.
BCA 4th and 6th Semester commenced from Monday, 16 December 2024.
MCA 2nd semester Monday 08:30-10:30 has LARAVEL practical.
MCA 2nd semester Monday 10:30-11:30 has iOS theory.
MCA 2nd semester Monday 12:15-01:15 has ELECTIVE theory.
MCA 2nd semester Monday 01:30-02:30 has ASP.NET theory.
MCA 2nd semester Monday 02:30-03:30 has LARAVEL theory.
MCA 2nd semester Tuesday 08:30-10:30 has LARAVEL Theory.
MCA 2nd semester Tuesday 10:30-11:30 has iOS theory.
MCA 2nd semester Tuesday 12:15-01:15 has Python theory.
MCA 2nd semester Tuesday 01:30-02:30 has ASP.NET theory.
MCA 2nd semester Tuesday 02:30-03:30 has LARAVEL theory.
Mission & Vision: SRIMCA mission is to remain on the cutting edge of education, research and service to industry and society.
SRIMCA vision is to become a globally recognized premier educational institute for academic excellence.
Contact & Location: * Location: Maliba Campus, Gopal Vidyanagar, Bardoli, Surat, Gujarat
* University: Constituent college of Uka Tarsadia University
